If you are into Coastal Defense and fortifications, the battery is a must see.  Access is easy, but to not waste the trip, make sure that you coordinate the time of your visit to coincide with the NPS demonstrations of this one of a kind cannon.  Hard to think of a time before airplanes, when the vast majority of these fortifications became obsolete.  Otherwise, look up the battery on Youtube; there are several decent films of how this mount actually worked.
